check_controller_setting.title: Check controller compatibility mode
check_controller_setting.description: Checking whether controller compatibility mode is enabled and SDL environment variables are correctly configured.

fix_enable_compat.title: Enable controller compatibility mode
fix_enable_compat.description: Enabling controller compatibility mode improves detection and button mapping. If using Bluetooth, also try unpairing and re-pairing in macOS System Settings > Bluetooth.

verify_fix.title: Did this fix the controller issue?
verify_fix.description: Try launching the program and testing the controller. For wireless controllers, also check macOS System Settings > Bluetooth and try re-pairing.

resolved.title: Problem resolved
resolved.description: The controller issue has been fixed. You can export a session report for your records.

escalate.title: Additional diagnostics needed
escalate.description: The automated controller checks have not resolved the issue. For Bluetooth controllers, try unpairing and re-pairing in macOS System Settings > Bluetooth. For wired controllers, try a different USB port or cable. Export a diagnostic report for further analysis.
